metadata.name: Subhadra
metadata.primary_role: Sister of Krishna and Balarama / Wife of Arjuna / Mother of Abhimanyu
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Yadava Dynasty, Dwaraka, sister of Krishna)
metadata.divine_origin: Sister of the Supreme Godhead Krishna — inherits divine Yadava beauty and the fierce spirit of the Yadava warrior women

timelines.context_description: Subhadra — the spirited Yadava princess who eloped with Arjuna (with Krishna's help), a trained warrior in her own right who drives Arjuna's chariot during their elopement, and later the grieving mother of Abhimanyu.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Warm dark-olive Yadava complexion — similar to Krishna's but lighter, radiant with health and vitality, the distinctive Yadava beauty
physical_appearance.height: Medium height, strong and athletic — a Yadava princess trained in self-defense and chariot-driving
physical_appearance.build: Athletic and strong — Yadava women are warriors, she drives a war chariot during the elopement chase, fit and capable, not a delicate princess
physical_appearance.facial_features: Beautiful spirited face with bright intelligent eyes sparkling with life and humor (Krishna's sister shares his mischief), strong Yadava features, confident wide smile, a face that shows both joy and fierce determination, resembles Krishna enough to be recognizable as his sister
physical_appearance.hair: Long thick black hair, styled in the Yadava manner — different from the Hastinapur style, often decorated with shells and ocean-motifs (Dwaraka is a coastal city)
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: She is visually linked to Krishna — the same Yadava features are recognizable, she drives a chariot with skilled confidence during the elopement, her grief at Abhimanyu's death is one of the most powerful maternal scenes

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Yadava princess attire — rich blue and coral sari (ocean-influenced colors of Dwaraka), different from Hastinapur's fashion, a warrior's practical garments beneath when needed
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Yadava-style jewelry — coral and pearl necklaces (ocean influence), gold shell-motif earrings, blue gem bangles, distinctive from the ruby-gold style of Hastinapur
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: Can drive a war chariot expertly, carries a small dagger (Yadava women's tradition), trained in self-defense by Krishna

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Bright, spirited, passionate — the voice of a woman who chose her own husband against her family's wishes, fierce in love and fierce in grief
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Bright warm mezzo-soprano — lively and spirited in joy, rising to fierce determination in crisis, devastating in maternal grief
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with Yadava directness and warmth, none of the formal restraint of Hastinapur's women, expresses emotions openly, her wit shows Krishna's influence, her grief for Abhimanyu is expressed without restraint
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Spirited independent joy, passionate love, the fierce grief of a mother who loses her only son to a rigged battle

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Vibrant cinematic shot of Princess Subhadra, age 25, Yadava princess. Warm dark-olive Yadava complexion, bright spirited eyes, confident smile. Athletic build. Wearing rich blue and coral Yadava-style sari with pearl and coral jewelry. Driving a war chariot at speed during the elopement, reins expertly held, hair flying in the wind, looking over her shoulder with a bold smile. Coastal Yadava landscape with golden cliffs and ocean. 3D Pixar style, adventurous dynamic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A bright, warm female mezzo-soprano. Lively, spirited, passionately expressive. Yadava directness and warmth. Age approximately 25 years.
